Bug Report — Open Bugs

redmineflux_devops — rfd-125 Centralized Audit Log (Suite 16)
Date: 2026-06-03 Plugin: Release 6.0.0 (version 2033) Environment: Local Docker (localhost:3008) Open Bugs: 3

Summary

Bug IDTitleSeverityStatusTC
BUG-RDV-087 DevOps Audit Log admin menu link has no visible text — page undiscoverable High OPEN TC-RDV-576
BUG-RDV-088 Build trigger action not logged — builds controller missing Auditable concern High OPEN TC-RDV-578
BUG-RDV-089 Audit log viewer ignores per_page URL parameter — page size fixed at 50 Low OPEN TC-RDV-593
BUG-RDV-087 HIGH
DevOps Audit Log admin menu link has no visible text — page is undiscoverable via UI
Redmine Version
6.0.0
Plugin
redmineflux_devops
Environment
Local Docker (localhost:3008)
User Role
Administrator
Date
2026-06-03
TC Reference
TC-RDV-576

Steps to Reproduce

  1. Log in as admin
  2. Navigate to Administration (/admin)
  3. Inspect the admin sidebar menu

Expected Result

  • A labelled "DevOps Audit Log" link should appear in the Administration sidebar allowing admins to navigate to /admin/devops_audit

Actual Result

  • No "DevOps Audit Log" link is visible in the admin sidebar
  • An invisible blank <a href="/admin/devops_audit#"></a> exists — injected by the plugin but has no text, no icon, ends with #
  • The page is only reachable by typing the URL directly: /admin/devops_audit

Screenshot Evidence

Admin panel (/admin) — no DevOps Audit Log link in sidebar. Standard Redmine admin items only.
BUG-RDV-088 HIGH
Build trigger action not logged in audit log — builds controller missing Auditable concern
Redmine Version
6.0.0
Plugin
redmineflux_devops
Environment
Local Docker (localhost:3008)
User Role
Administrator
Date
2026-06-03
TC Reference
TC-RDV-578

Steps to Reproduce

  1. Log in as a user with trigger_builds permission
  2. Navigate to a project DevOps > Builds and trigger a build
  3. Log in as admin and navigate to /admin/devops_audit
  4. Check the audit_action dropdown for a build-related action type

Expected Result

  • A build.trigger audit entry is created when a build is triggered
  • rfd-125: "every privileged DevOps action records an audit row" — build triggering is privileged

Actual Result

  • No build.trigger action type in the audit_action dropdown
  • Builds controller is not instrumented with the Auditable concern
  • 12 other action types log correctly: branch.create, deployment.approve, env_request.create, environment.*, freeze.*, release.create

Screenshot Evidence

audit_action dropdown — 13 action types shown, none related to build triggers.
BUG-RDV-089 LOW
Audit log viewer ignores per_page URL parameter — page size fixed at 50
Redmine Version
6.0.0
Plugin
redmineflux_devops
Environment
Local Docker (localhost:3008)
User Role
Administrator
Date
2026-06-03
TC Reference
TC-RDV-593

Steps to Reproduce

  1. Log in as admin and navigate to /admin/devops_audit
  2. Observe the "Per page: 25, 50" options in the pagination bar
  3. Click the "25" per-page link (navigates to ?per_page=25)
  4. Observe the page result

Expected Result

  • Navigating to ?per_page=25 should show 25 events per page with page navigation

Actual Result

  • All 49 events shown on a single page — per_page URL parameter is ignored
  • Pagination HTML shows <span class="selected">50</span> confirming page size stays at 50
  • Multi-page navigation cannot be tested with current dataset

Screenshot Evidence

URL shows ?per_page=25 but pagination still shows (1-49/49) with 50 as selected page size.
